en_title: Matt Damon Wants New Jason Bourne Movie to 'Be Like the First 3' as Work With Conclave Director Continues
cn_title: 马特·达蒙希望新《谍影重重》电影看齐前三部
subtitle: 故事仍难定
opus_summary: 马特·达蒙透露，他正与《教皇选举》导演Edward Berger研究新《谍影重重》电影，希望质量看齐前三部。项目难点在于延续线性故事的同时，既满足观众期待又提供新内容。

paragraphs.en: Just as The Odyssey makes landfall, star Matt Damon has offered an update on his new Jason Bourne movie with Conclave and All Quiet on the Western Front director Edward Berger.
paragraphs.cn: 随着《奥德赛》登陆影院，主演马特·达蒙也更新了他与《教皇选举》《西线无战事》导演Edward Berger合作的新《谍影重重》电影进展。

paragraphs.en: The actor touched on the future of his beloved action hero during a conversation on ESPN's The Rich Eisen Show . In between working with Christopher Nolan and teasing another Oceans movie, he said he's been working with Berger to revisit the Bourne franchise.
paragraphs.cn: 达蒙在ESPN节目《The Rich Eisen Show》中谈到这位经典动作英雄的未来。他表示，在与克里斯托弗·诺兰合作并预告另一部《十一罗汉》系列电影之余，自己一直与Berger研究如何重返《谍影重重》系列。

paragraphs.en: "There's a great director named Ed Berger – he did All Quiet on the Western Front," Damon said. "He's a wonderful director, and we're talking about it," Damon said. "We're just trying to figure it out. We're trying to nail the story down because I'd love to do it. It's just that thing where, if we do it, we want it to be like the first three."
paragraphs.cn: 达蒙说：「有位很出色的导演叫Ed Berger，他执导了《西线无战事》。他是一位非常棒的导演，我们正在讨论这件事。我们只是想把它弄明白，努力敲定故事，因为我很想拍。问题在于，如果我们真的要做，就希望它能像前三部那样好。」

paragraphs.en: Damon first played Jason Bourne in Doug Liman's The Bourne Identity in 2002. He's since shown up for three sequels: The Bourne Supremacy (2004), The Bourne Ultimatum (2007), and Jason Bourne (2016). The only entry he skipped out on starring in was The Bourne Legacy , which was directed by Andor mastermind Tony Gilroy and starred Avengers veteran Jeremy Renner.
paragraphs.cn: 达蒙于2002年在Doug Liman执导的《谍影重重》中首次饰演杰森·伯恩，此后又出演三部续集：《谍影重重2》（2004）、《谍影重重3》（2007）和《谍影重重5》（2016）。他唯一缺席主演的是《谍影重重4》，该片由《安多》主创Tony Gilroy执导，《复仇者联盟》演员Jeremy Renner主演。

paragraphs.en: That would make the new film Jason Bourne 6 as long as things progress smoothly. Word of a revival for the franchise originally arrived in 2023, with first details promising Berger's involvement but not necessarily Damon's. Universal then picked up the rights in 2025 , but as time has passed, it's now been 10 years without a proper entry. Damon is hoping they "can crack it," saying that he thinks they "have a line of sight on how to do it."
paragraphs.cn: 如果一切进展顺利，新片将成为《谍影重重6》。该系列重启的消息最早于2023年传出，最初只确认Berger参与，并未确定达蒙回归。环球影业随后于2025年取得版权，但如今距离上一部正统作品已经过去10年。达蒙希望团队「能够找到解法」，并认为他们「已经看到了实现方式」。

paragraphs.en: "It's tough because it's not built like a James Bond, where every movie is its own mission," he said. "People can even change the person playing Bond. It's a linear story, so it makes it more challenging to do a sequel where you're giving people what they want, but also enough new stuff. It's a tricky one."
paragraphs.cn: 他说：「这很难，因为它不像詹姆斯·邦德，每部电影都是独立任务，甚至可以更换饰演邦德的演员。《谍影重重》是线性故事，所以拍续集更具挑战：既要给观众想看的东西，也要加入足够多的新内容。这确实很棘手。」

paragraphs.en: Damon hasn't exactly had too much free time to make Jason Bourne his priority. This weekend, he helped launch Nolan's The Odyssey, which he stars in as Odysseus. He also showed up in 2023's Oppenheimer and was featured in prominent roles in projects like Ford v Ferrari, The Last Duel, Air, and The Rip.
paragraphs.cn: 达蒙并没有太多空闲时间把杰森·伯恩项目放在首位。本周末，他主演的诺兰新片《奥德赛》上映，片中饰演奥德修斯。他还出演了2023年的《奥本海默》，并在《极速车王》《最后的决斗》《气垫传奇》和《劫后余凶》等作品中担任重要角色。

paragraphs.en: While the next Jason Bourne movie comes together, you can read IGN's 7/10 review for the 2016 installment. We praised the movie at the time but said it failed "to hit the dizzying height of films 1-3."
paragraphs.cn: 在下一部《谍影重重》逐步成形之际，可以回顾IGN对2016年作品给出的7/10评分。IGN当时肯定了影片，但认为它未能「达到前三部令人目眩的高度」。
